note: Paired-probes RNG; every boost in [0, 2.0] yields identical hit_top15 at all N (probe equivalence). Boost adds only ~0.005-0.015 ms wall_p99 with no recall change on the kids-ball IMAGE -> same-episode TEXT+AUDIO metric. Episode-scoped retrieval Pareto-dominates (faster + perfect recall) when query_episode_id is known.
